map.islandDesc: Read with focus — one line at a time!
map.bayDesc: Letters get colors to help you tell them apart!
map.blocksDesc: Play with sounds and build words!
map.factoryDesc: Build words with sounds and letters!
map.intro: Move across the scene to light up the harbor, island, bay, valley, and beach, then jump straight into each reading activity.

mascot.welcome: Hi there! I'm Lumi, your reading buddy! Let's explore the Reading Planet together!
mascot.uploadHint: Want to read something? Upload a book and I'll help you read it!
mascot.readingStart: Great choice! Let's start reading. I'll be right here if you need help!
mascot.tryAgain: Almost there! Let's try once more!
mascot.goodbye: Great job today! See you tomorrow!

library.title: Bookshelf Harbor
library.subtitle: Your reading collection
library.groupsHint: Drag books into a group, or drag groups to reorder the shelf.
library.groupEmpty: No books in this group yet.
library.empty: No books yet! Upload your first book to start reading.
library.deleteConfirm: Remove this book from your shelf?

upload.title: Upload a Book
upload.success: Your book is ready to read!

error.tooLarge: This file is too big! Please try a smaller file (max 20MB).
error.unsupported: Oops! I can only read PDF and TXT files.
error.empty: This file seems empty. Try another one!
error.generic: Something went wrong. Let's try again!

progress.complete: You finished the whole text! Amazing!

detective.title: Letter Detective
detective.instruction: Find all the '{letter}' letters! Tap them to mark!
detective.complete: You found them all! Great detective work!

feedback.finished: You did it! So proud of you! 🎉

islandHub.recentShelfHint: Start from a recent book and skip an extra step.
islandHub.emptyShelf: Your recent books will appear here.
islandHub.emptyShelfHint: Place a book in Bookshelf Harbor, then come back for the adventure.

spotlightPage.title: Read One Bright Line at a Time
spotlightPage.subtitle: Keep your eyes on one small step, and the text feels clearer.
spotlightPage.intro: Try spotlight, reading window, and follow-along highlight first.
spotlightPage.card1Body: See one line at a time for a calmer view.
spotlightPage.card2Body: Keep a little context without showing too much.
spotlightPage.card3Body: Move forward with the glowing words.
spotlightPage.sampleLine1: The little boat rocked gently on the lake.
spotlightPage.sampleLine2: Mia followed one bright line at a time.
spotlightPage.sampleLine3: Soon the story felt calm and clear.
spotlightPage.studentPoint3: Then switch to your own book when ready.
spotlightPage.teacherPoint1: Warm up with the sample text first.
spotlightPage.teacherPoint2: Then move learners into their own books.
spotlightPage.teacherPoint3: The window mode is a good first choice.

letterBayPage.title: Find the Little Clues in Letters
letterBayPage.subtitle: Some letters like to dress alike. Let's notice their tiny secrets.
letterBayPage.intro: Meet the four letter friends, then search for them in a short sample.
letterBayPage.card1Body: One quick look at color makes clues easier to spot.
letterBayPage.card2Body: Tap a letter card and listen to its sound.
letterBayPage.card3Body: Each letter you find becomes a new clue.
letterBayPage.sampleLine2: drum help us spot shapes while
letterBayPage.studentPoint1: Meet the four letter friends first.
letterBayPage.studentPoint2: Search for them in the sample text next.
letterBayPage.studentPoint3: Each one you find earns a star.
letterBayPage.teacherPoint1: Tap the letter cards for a quick demo.
letterBayPage.teacherPoint2: Search together in the sample text.

echoValleyPage.title: Listen First, Then Read Along
echoValleyPage.subtitle: Move with the story while glowing words show the next step.
echoValleyPage.intro: Listen once, then follow the glowing word path.
echoValleyPage.card1Body: Let your ears and eyes travel together first.
echoValleyPage.card3Body: The highlighted word shows where to go next.
echoValleyPage.sampleLine3: and let the glowing words guide us on.
echoValleyPage.studentPoint2: Then read along with the glowing words.
echoValleyPage.studentPoint3: Switch to your own book when ready.
echoValleyPage.teacherPoint1: Let the whole group listen once first.
echoValleyPage.teacherPoint2: Then guide a small group to read along.
echoValleyPage.teacherPoint3: Steady speed works well to begin.
